game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **던전 추적자 (Dungeon Tracer):** Players navigate a grid-based dungeon by connecting adjacent tiles of the same type (e.g., 3 sword tiles for attack, 3 shield tiles for defense, 3 potion tiles for healing), using intuitive swipe controls to draw paths. Connecting attack tiles damages nearby enemies, while defense tiles reduce incoming damage from enemy attacks that occur after the player's turn. Defeating enemies grants experience points, allowing the player character to level up and improve core stats (e.g., +5 Attack, +10 HP), and unlock new abilities from a pool of 30. Dungeons are procedurally generated, ensuring a unique layout and enemy placement in each run, with 25 types of special monsters. Players collect gold from defeated enemies and treasure chests, which can be spent between runs to purchase and upgrade over 400 unique items and apply 20 powerful upgrades to existing gear. Difficulty scales across 4 selectable modes, increasing enemy health, damage, and spawn rates (e.g., 10% faster monster spawns on Hard difficulty). The primary goal is to survive as long as possible and achieve the highest score on the global leaderboard; a run ends when the player's health points (e.g., starting at 100 HP) reach zero, losing all temporary progress but retaining permanent item unlocks and upgrades.
game_info.description: Navigate a procedurally generated dungeon by connecting adjacent tiles of the same type to attack enemies, defend against damage, and heal yourself. Connect 3+ matching tiles to activate their effect: swords attack nearby enemies, shields reduce incoming damage, and potions restore health. Defeat enemies to gain experience, level up, and increase your stats. Survive as long as possible and achieve the highest score!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections
Space: Confirm tile selection and start/end path drawing
Shift: Cancel current path
Z: Quick heal (if available)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic tile matching mechanics and ensures the player can successfully connect tiles to perform actions. Validates that connecting sword tiles damages enemies, shield tiles provide defense, and potion tiles heal the player.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will systematically scan the grid for matching tiles and create paths of 3 or more tiles. It prioritizes sword matches when enemies are present, shield matches when under threat, and potion matches when health is low.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player can consistently make valid matches, enemies take damage from sword matches, defense is gained from shield matches, and health is restored from potion matches without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by implementing an optimal survival strategy. The goal is to defeat multiple waves of enemies and survive as long as possible to achieve a high score, eventually reaching a predefined victory threshold.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI uses an intelligent priority system: attack when enemies are close and vulnerable, defend when enemy count is high, and heal strategically when health drops below 50%. It creates the longest possible matches to maximize effectiveness and attempts to chain combos.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the player survives for an extended period, defeats multiple enemies, gains several levels, and achieves a high score (e.g., 1000+ points) demonstrating mastery of the game mechanics.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests edge cases and defensive play. Validates that the player can survive under pressure when surrounded by multiple enemies and low on health by making optimal defensive and healing choices.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI prioritizes survival over offense, focusing heavily on shield and potion matches. It avoids risky attack patterns and plays conservatively, only attacking when it's safe to do so.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the player can survive difficult situations with low health, effectively manage resources, and demonstrate that defensive play is a viable strategy for extended survival.
